programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle start in Bend and attempt to ride two Honda three-wheelers all the way to the Oregon coast.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: The Dirt Heads remove almost a ton of weight from a Nissan Armada in an attempt to turn it into a dune-climbing sand machine.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.sub-title: The Turd Bird And Travel Y'all Part 2

programme.title: Flipping RVs
programme.desc: Justin and Anna have their hands full with a tricky flip. Justin finds a run-down 1949 Kit Chateau and the team transform it into a vintage trailer hotel.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou work on their first Dodge Viper. Why not start with a bolt-on supercharger with long tube headers and exhaust? It's the Car Fix way: go big, or go home!

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou give a '71 Plymouth GTX more power by installing a supplemental planetary gearbox.

programme.title: FourWheeler

programme.title: Custom Carolina

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part 1 of Jesus the Saviour, Pastor Bayless explores the Greek word "sozo," which describes salvation as complete wholeness-spirit, mind, and body.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you see prayer as a privilege or a duty? Today, Joyce teaches how to confidently ask, seek, and pray with a heart aligned to God's will.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden: Real Murders
programme.desc: Aurora finds a group member killed in a way that resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other 'copycat' killings follow, Aurora will have to uncover the person behind the game.

programme.title: George for Real
programme.desc: George Verwer travels all over the world, driven by a passion to see others come to faith. Discover how his hunger for God was ignited during his turbulent teenage years and how God led him to ignite a dynamic global missionary movement.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Under Attack? Put On The Armour Of God! Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Braving the Big Battle with the Baroness
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum! She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow always seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth receives a sentimental surprise in time for Little Jack's first day of school. Nathan trains a new Mountie cadet. Rosemary and Lee make a landmark decision.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Less of Me - More of God - Part 2
programme.desc: Do you want to experience real freedom in your life? Today, Joyce shares what it means to truly know Jesus, not just know of Him!

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: Prone to Wander
programme.desc: Seven months after a family tragedy, Anastasia Dearborn withdraws to the Appalachian Trail to salvage her identity but gets more than she bargains for after encountering three fellow hikers.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: In 1956, five young American men were mercilessly killed by members of the Auca tribe; a people in Ecuador whom those young men had gone to serve and befriend.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Record Breakers _ Nevill & Bubsie _ The First to Drive Around Australia
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker and TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: An Easter Bloom
programme.desc: A young gardener sets out to save her family farm by entering a floral competition for Easter. She meets a local pastor along the way who helps her restore the hope she lost.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: A new direction brings fresh struggles as Gary puts his investigative talents to use. A new assistant brings a unique perspective to the workplace.

programme.title: Greater
programme.desc: Explores ways that Jesus leads people into freedom; from instant life changing God encounters, to transformation that takes places over years. Uncover practical steps towards inner freedom.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt11
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: The plump black-and-white bear, Po, is back in his biggest adventure yet.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is back and is coping with some major life changes. This chapter explores the emotional lives of our pets: the deep bond between them and the families that love them.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Street Outlaws

programme.title: Burger Land
programme.desc: George is in search of New Orleans' best burger joints, from a hamburger served on light and flaky po' boy bread to a succulent cheddar burger smothered in buttery mushrooms.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes a culinary trip with flavour. A funky LA spot fills bowls with eclectic eats while a Norfolk, VA, market offers Mexican specialties.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron turn a 1970 Lincoln Continental Mark III into a muscle car and bring a '68 Ford pickup back to life. Richard scoops up a 1970s style hot rod kit car.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior vs Junior

programme.title: New Creation Church

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Less of Me - More of God - Part 2
programme.desc: Do you want to experience real freedom in your life? Today, Joyce shares what it means to truly know Jesus, not just know of Him!

programme.title: An Easter Bloom
programme.desc: A young gardener sets out to save her family farm by entering a floral competition for Easter. She meets a local pastor along the way who helps her restore the hope she lost.

programme.title: A Marriage Made in Heaven
programme.desc: It appears Demetri Chicopoulos is living a charmed life, but he has lost his mother and recently gone through a divorce. In a prayerful moment Demetri asks God if he could just relive one week of his life.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: The story of a 13-year-old girl who goes to live with her estranged, eccentric father following the death of her mother. She finds renewed happiness when she adopts an orphaned flock of baby geese.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Under Attack? Put On The Armour Of God! Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.sub-title: Ways We Unknowingly Shame Our Kids
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part 1 of Jesus the Saviour, Pastor Bayless explores the Greek word "sozo," which describes salvation as complete wholeness-spirit, mind, and body.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: How can we heal from deep pain? Join Joyce, Ginger, and Erin as they speak with Nona Jones about God's healing power and a future filled with hope.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How to Be Sure of God's Will/The Foundation of Unwavering Faith
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible.

programme.title: An Easter Bloom
programme.desc: A young gardener sets out to save her family farm by entering a floral competition for Easter. She meets a local pastor along the way who helps her restore the hope she lost.

programme.title: Miracle Matt
programme.desc: Miracle Matt is the story of Matt Manzari. It is not only an account of how he survived 2 near death accidents, but this inspirational documentary takes a look into how he wears his scars for the world to see that miracles are possible.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Ambushed by the Ambassador of Ignorance
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys doing Gods work!

programme.title: Miraculous Victories of Israel
programme.desc: What happens when the God of Israel intervenes in the battles of His people? Miraculous victories occur - victories that are sometimes inexplicable and often unbelievable.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A seven-year-old's life is changed forever with the arrival of a suit-wearing, briefcase-carrying baby: his new baby brother.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks have moved on from delivering babies to packages. But when an order for a baby appears, the best delivery stork must scramble to fix the error by delivering the baby.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends on a thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary's parents suddenly die, she's sent to live with her uncle on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters crew looks at the false prophecies of Joseph Smith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: How can we heal from deep pain? Join Joyce, Ginger, and Erin as they speak with Nona Jones about God's healing power and a future filled with hope.

programme.title: Show Me The Father
programme.desc: An inspiring documentary which demonstrates through dozens of interviews with key influential figures just how vital the role of the father is for families as well as society as a whole.

programme.title: Life on the Island of Jesus
programme.desc: What happens when we surrender our dreams to God? This is the true story of missionary pastor Scott Campbell and explores how God uses great difficulties over time to transform followers of Jesus into new creations.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How to Be Sure of God's Will/The Foundation of Unwavering Faith
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.sub-title: Followers of Jesus are Hard Workers
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today, Pastor Peter Mortlock shares the story of Samson. He teaches how through this story, Samson was rebellious but to God but he was still called faithful.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.sub-title: The Power of Good: Ian Warren
programme.desc: Thinking that you need to be great, before you start to do good is a misguided mindset. When people engage in doing good as a business mindset, it leads to success, including better financial outcomes.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Kels takes a trip to Smorgasburg to find all of the food gems while Allie kayaks up an appetite.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Can God truly heal deep wounds? Watch Joyce, Ginger, and Erin chat with Nona Jones about healing, faith, and discovering a brighter future through God's love.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Jesus' command to "love your enemy" is perhaps one of His best-known teachings. Jesus taught extensively about forgiveness and His words have echoed down the centuries to be some of the most significant ever spoken.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Shiloh - The Place where God Once Dwelt
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and stepfamilies make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So when Rachel's relationship with Steven became more serious, they had to navigate blending a family.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth receives a sentimental surprise in time for Little Jack's first day of school. Nathan trains a new Mountie cadet. Rosemary and Lee make a landmark decision.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: The ladies follow Lucy to remote Nepal with CBM and witness the life changing operation of a four year old boy called Buzz and witness him see for the very first time in his life.

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: Walking in the Footsteps of Faith
programme.desc: Discover how giants of the faith like Mother Theresa, Martin Luther, and David Livingston lived following Steve walking in their footsteps!

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into NYC's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: To save their islands, the flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: NRL Tonight
programme.desc: Get up to date with the latest NRL news featuring big name guests and key interviews.

programme.title: AFL Tonight
programme.desc: Get up to date with the latest news out of the AFL, along with nightly big name guests and agenda setting opinion.

programme.title: Insecure

programme.title: Insecure
programme.desc: Issa and her new man tread awkward waters at a work-related social event. Meanwhile, Molly juggles multiple suitors, and Issa plays defence against online attacks about her business.

programme.title: Insecure

programme.title: Insecure

programme.title: Insecure

programme.title: Insecure

programme.title: Insecure

programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today, Pastor Peter Mortlock shares the story of Samson. He teaches how through this story, Samson was rebellious but to God but he was still called faithful.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part 1 of Jesus the Saviour, Pastor Bayless explores the Greek word "sozo," which describes salvation as complete wholeness-spirit, mind, and body.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: Larryboy and the Fib from Outer Space
programme.desc: After accidentally breaking his dad's prized collector's plate, Junior Asparagus covers up the accident. When he tells too many fibs, Junior learns that God wants us always to tell the truth.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt11
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Eating disorders can take control of an individual's life and have a devastating effect, if left untreated. In this episode we hear first hand from guest Angie Cahill about eating disorders and the journey to recovery.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Many people don't know how to access the joy that God freely gives. Today, Joyce shares how to overcome common obstacles to receiving His joy.

programme.title: Convocation
programme.desc: Weekly Liberty University Campus Convocation services connect students with their Creator through passionate worship and powerful messages firmly rooted in Biblical truth.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth receives a sentimental surprise in time for Little Jack's first day of school. Nathan trains a new Mountie cadet. Rosemary and Lee make a landmark decision.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: The ladies follow Lucy to remote Nepal with CBM and witness the life changing operation of a four year old boy called Buzz and witness him see for the very first time in his life.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Deeply practical and intensely personal, The Divine Adventure unpacks 12 powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, GOD'S PEOPLE explores the one thing bigger and more wonderful than the world - God's BIG love for us.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Join in the incredible adventures of Christopher and Joy. Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend, Gizmo.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Robert Boyle - The Man Who Saw the Future
programme.desc: In the 17th century a man set out to prove that God existed. His method - SCIENCE.

programme.title: TV4DADs
programme.desc: In Season 6 of the program, Brian teams up with his daughter Jeni (from Jeni:Seeking the Extraordinary) for an adventure in Florida that sees them catching fish, throwing axes, and being ambushed by killer birds.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Allie & Kels get cheesy with a very dairy loaded episode.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Victor comes from Rwanda, where in 1994 100 days of war and genocide shocked the world. But now a new story of radical healing and transformation is being written in the pages of history.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: A Pilgrimage through Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals and abbeys throughout England and Wales, featuring interviews with historians and experts.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Educators, entrepreneurs and scientists bring a new generation of people into the cosmos.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.desc: Get up to date with the latest NRL news featuring big name guests and key interviews.
